pi_items.source: setup_task.sh and export_result.sh verify Mock Service on port 6666
setup_task.sh and export_result.sh verify Enricher on port 6661 (MLLP/TCP)

privileged_info_summary: The HTTP REST Enrichment Pipeline task creates a two-channel integration pipeline using Mirth Connect (NextGen's healthcare integration engine). The Mock Service listens on port 6666 (HTTP) and responds with JSON containing region information based on zip code input (0-4 → EAST, 5-9 → WEST). The Enricher listens on port 6661 (MLLP/TCP for HL7v2 messages), extracts zip codes from HL7 patient address fields (PID.11.5), calls the Mock Service, and inserts the region into the county/parish field (PID.11.9). All enriched messages are saved to /tmp/enriched_output/. Test data is synthetic, created by the setup script with sample HL7 messages containing zip codes 10001 (EAST) and 90210 (WEST). The task validates end-to-end data enrichment and correct HL7 field manipulation.
